Help Us Break Things
🚧 Heads up — this store is NOT live yet. You're here to help us find out what's broken before it is. 🚧
Beta Tester Signup · Pre-Launch · Limited Spots

Break Our Store First.

The Snark-A-Tects store is under construction. We need real humans to poke around and tell us what doesn't work before we unleash it on the world.

Store Under Construction ✦ Beta Testers Needed ✦ Not Live Yet ✦ Help Us Find The Bugs ✦ AI Statement Tees ✦ Coming Soon ✦ Store Under Construction ✦ Beta Testers Needed ✦ Not Live Yet ✦ Help Us Find The Bugs ✦ AI Statement Tees ✦ Coming Soon ✦
// What You're Signing Up For

Your Mission,
Should You Accept It

⚠ Important: The store is not live
The link you'll receive goes to our beta store — it looks real, but it is still a work in progress. Things may be broken, missing, or just plain weird. That's the point. Do NOT expect a normal shopping experience. Your job is to find the weirdness and report it.
01
Browse the store
Visit the beta link we'll send you. Look at the products. Does anything look off? Missing images? Text that makes no sense?
02
Try to add something to your cart
Pick a tee, choose a colour and size, and add it to cart. Does the cart update? Can you see your item? Did anything break?
03
Go through checkout
Enter your details and proceed as far as you're comfortable. Note: this is a TEST environment — no real charges will go through.
04
Fill out the feedback form
We'll include a link to our feedback form. The more thorough your feedback, the more it helps — tell us everything you noticed.
Takes about 10 minutes. No purchase required. We may follow up by email if we have questions about your feedback — you'll be asked to consent to that below.
Sign Me Up
Tell us a bit about yourself and we'll send you the beta link plus instructions.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
We'll send your beta link immediately after signup.
No spam. No marketing list. Just the testing stuff.
✦
You're In.
Check your inbox — we've just sent you
the beta store link and instructions.

Thank you for helping us get this right.
— Mere & Anne
